revision_notes: Dropped employees variable; set research_feasibility exclusion to <=0; normalized weights to sum 1; kept two archetypes.

approved_archetypes.description: B2B/platform with solid growth and margin; buy-and-build potential.
Larger, stable margin; roll-up or add-on candidates.

approved_review_prompts.label: Strong fit
approved_review_prompts.prompt_text: Assess buy-and-build potential, margin sustainability, and customer concentration. Prioritize for deep dive.

approved_review_prompts.label: Stable cashflow
approved_review_prompts.prompt_text: Verify roll-up or add-on rationale; check for hidden leverage or one-off margin effects.

approved_review_prompts.label: Borderline score
approved_review_prompts.prompt_text: Review why Layer 1 score is mid-range; confirm whether qualitative factors justify advancement or pass.
